caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "FOCUS with Margaret Harrington," featuring a discussion on climate crisis poems titled "No More Time" by Greg Delanty. The split-screen format shows two participants: an older woman on the left, who seems to be Margaret Harrington, and an older man on the right, likely Greg Delanty. Both individuals are engaged in conversation, with the woman listening attentively while the man speaks, possibly reciting or discussing his poem. The background of the woman's setting includes some decorative elements like string lights, while the man is in front of a blue wall with an "OPEN" sign visible, suggesting he might be in a public or semi-public space. The overall tone of the video suggests a serious and thoughtful dialogue about environmental issues through the lens of poetry.
